untestedComponents.details: No tests for camera permission handling, QR scanning pipeline, or overlay frame rendering.
No tests for WebSocket lifecycle, API calls, QR decoding fallback, or Keychain storage operations.
No visual regression, snapshot, or UI automation tests for Spaces, Chats, Workspace, Settings, or New Task screens.
No tests for Liquid Glass treatments, custom button behaviors, or accessory bar elements.
No unit or integration tests exist for executing the live Antigravity CLI (agentapi.bat), spawning the background process, parsing the `--help` outputs, or polling log files (transcript.jsonl).
No tests exist for Windows DPAPI encryption wrappers since they are currently unused.
No tests cover the live WebSocket tasks endpoint (/v1/tasks/:taskId/events) or token-based Authorization header check under websocket context.
